blocks.summary: Jordan requested dashboard. Designed full architecture and data model.

blocks.task: Dashboard architecture review & data model validation

blocks.details: Critical review of dashboard design. Validated: static+JSON polling is right, vanilla JS is right, data model covers all requirements. Key decisions: new repo, regex parsing, unit tests for data layer only. Wrote block-by-block build plan.
Setting up project structure: index.html, CSS dark theme, JS app skeleton, sample dashboard.json.
